title: Escher's Gambit
description: A Chess Sandbox where Figures can move across Walls and Stuff. It is easy and Intuitive to use!
body:
Welcome to the Escher's Gambit​ Mod!

This Mod is based on the Game of Chess but Figures can move on Walls! When you click on an Item with the correct Rod you see where it can move and can click on the highlighted squares to automatically move it there!

Items:

This Mod adds Chess Pieces that can be played with! They come in 4 Colors and can be moved over Edges!

Chessboard with Wormhole:

They can be moved using the Rod of Moving of the same Colour and can be destroyed or Rotated using The Rod of Removal and Rod of Rotation!

Creativity

Feel free to come up with your own boards :) \ The Aim of this Mod is to provide a Sandbox that can be used in different ways.

Survival:

To get the "Chess Core"-Item to begin crafting your Chess Pieces you have to kill a Zombie. For more Info I recommend checking out the Wiki!

Why should I download the Mod?

You Should download the Mod if you like to try out new crazy and weird Versions of Chess!
